track_prompt: Shift the visual language elements to the right hemisphere of the card to avoid overlapping with text. Extend the system by adding a 'Track' module/badge.
input_feedback: The previous layout had overlapping text and graphics. It lacked modular segmentation.
judge_feedback: Perfect. The text is highly legible, the visual language remains distinctive, and the new badge system elegantly extends the layout. No bounding box overlaps detected.
